title: GlowGlass Updated
description: Providing light emitting glass, panes and sand for all your luminescent needs!
body:
A continuation of Glowglass, providing light emitting glass, panes and sand for all your luminescent needs!

Start by crafting Glowsand and smelt it to obtain Glowglass, which can be dyed just like normal Glass.

Check the Images tab for recipes.

Original Project:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glowglass
